plugins.name: plugin-creator
plugins.description: Scaffolds new Claude Code plugins (agents, hooks, skills, commands) following the official Claude Code plugin guidelines.

plugins.name: amazon-doc-writer
plugins.description: Writes Amazon-style internal documents (PR/FAQ, technical design, mini design, analysis report, COE, OP1/OP2 narrative, WBR narrative) from a set of user-provided source files, following Amazon's narrative writing conventions.

plugins.name: autonomous-builder
plugins.description: Design-first autonomous builder. A single orchestrator runs a design gate (the only pre-code approval), projects a plan from the approved design, then executes each task through a task-coordinator that owns an implementer -> tester -> reviewer inner loop with two independent retry budgets (5 each). The implementer owns green tests; the tester inspects thoroughness and adds missing tests; the reviewer judges against a per-task ledger. A senior designer holds office hours and revises on PLAN_WRONG. A researcher maintains a shared, list-based per-feature knowledge base. At terminal states a reflector writes a developer-facing retrospective plus a per-feature scorecard (no runtime memory layer).
